title: English Thinking
objective: Students will explore english thinking concepts including Reflecting on Your Language Use.

steps.content: Welcome to an exciting lesson about Reflecting on Your Language Use!
Reflect on yourself as a language user — how your reading, writing, and speaking shift across audiences, purposes, and contexts, and where you want to develop further
Let's practice together! metalinguistic awareness development

Does you notice how they communicate differently in different situations — writing for school versus texting a friend, or speaking in a debate versus chatting at home — and can they explain why those differences matter?
You did it! Here's what we explored about Reflecting on Your Language Use: metalinguistic awareness development register and audience awareness research
